Description
org.moeaframework.util.io
Collection of I/O utility classes.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Resources.ResourceOption
    Resources.ResourceOption.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static Resources.ResourceOption[]
    Resources.ResourceOption.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.util.io with parameters of type Resources.ResourceOption
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static File
    Resources.asFile(Class<?> owner, String resource, Resources.ResourceOption... options)
    Locates the resource as a file on disk, extracting the contents of the resource to a file if required.
    static CommentedLineReader
    Resources.asLineReader(Class<?> owner, String resource, Resources.ResourceOption... options)
    Opens the resource as a CommentedLineReader.
    static Reader
    Resources.asReader(Class<?> owner, String resource, Resources.ResourceOption... options)
    Opens the resource as a Reader.
    static InputStream
    Resources.asStream(Class<?> owner, String resource, Resources.ResourceOption... options)
    Opens the resource as an InputStream.
    static String
    Resources.readString(Class<?> owner, String resource, Resources.ResourceOption... options)
    Loads the contents of the resource as a string.
